creator: nico@lifeisabug.com
text:
Nothing special there:

SENDMAIL_SUBMIT_MC=/etc/mail/devnull.submit.mc

.if exists(/usr/local/bin/wget)
   DISABLE_SIZE=yes
   FETCH_CMD=/usr/local/bin/wget --continue --passive-ftp
--no-check-certificate -t 2 -T 15
.endif

MASTER_SORT_REGEX?=://[^/]*\.de[/.]

WITH_IPV6=yes
WITHOUT_X11=yes

WEAK_OPT_BUILD= \
                        archivers/unzip

PERL_VERSION=5.12.3


On Fri, Aug 12, 2011 at 21:39, Sayetsky Anton <vsjcfm@gmail.com> wrote:

> Show the contents of your make.conf, please.
>
